title: Baby Creepers
description: Makes some creepers spawn as babies.
body:
![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/RIwmrDz6?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&label=Downloads&color=%2319c819) ![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1242212171472048288?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=Discord&color=%23266fff)

Makes it so 10% of creepers spawn as babies, making them smaller and faster.

![Baby creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c40393f6c5d8dc13b11f55736f6903255974fa0a.png)
### Note
**Don't expect many updates** as there's not much you can add to a datapack like this. I will try my best to update it to newer versions.
